user.title: Set up Chatterbox TTS
user.description:
Connect to your self-hosted Chatterbox TTS server.

Changing the model will hot-swap the engine on the server — this may take a moment while weights load into VRAM.

data_description.url: Full base URL including port (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:8004).
data_description.model_type: Original: emotion control. Turbo: fast, paralinguistic tags. Multilingual: 23 languages.
data_description.voice_mode: Clone: voice from an audio file. Predefined: voice from the server.

voice_params.title: Voice & Speech Style
voice_params.description: Select a voice and adjust speech parameters.

data_description.reference_audio_filename: Select a voice from the server.
data_description.exaggeration: Lower = flatter delivery; higher = more expressive. Ignored by Turbo.
data_description.cfg_weight: Lower = more creative; higher = closer to the reference voice. Ignored by Turbo.
data_description.speed_factor: Speech speed — values other than 1.0 may cause artifacts. Ignored by Turbo.
data_description.temperature: Lower = more consistent output; higher = more varied. Ignored by Turbo.
data_description.chunk_size: Words per synthesis chunk — lower = less latency; higher = better prosody.
data_description.stream: Send audio as it's generated instead of waiting for the full clip.
data_description.language: Only used by the Multilingual model.

error.fetch_voices_failed: Could not load voices from server. Using fallback list.
error.model_switch_failed: Failed to switch model on the server. Check that the server is running and the model is available.

init.title: Chatterbox TTS – Settings
init.description:
Adjust the model, voice, and speech style.

Changing the model will hot-swap the engine on the server.

data_description.model_type: Original: emotion control. Turbo: fast, paralinguistic tags. Multilingual: 23 languages.
data_description.reference_audio_filename: Select a voice from the server.
data_description.exaggeration: Lower = flatter delivery; higher = more expressive. Ignored by Turbo.
data_description.cfg_weight: Lower = more creative; higher = closer to the reference voice. Ignored by Turbo.
data_description.speed_factor: Speech speed — values other than 1.0 may cause artifacts. Ignored by Turbo.
data_description.temperature: Lower = more consistent output; higher = more varied. Ignored by Turbo.
data_description.chunk_size: Words per synthesis chunk — lower = less latency; higher = better prosody.
data_description.stream: Send audio as it's generated instead of waiting for the full clip.
data_description.language: Only used by the Multilingual model.

error.fetch_voices_failed: Could not load voices from server. Using fallback list.
error.model_switch_failed: Failed to switch model on the server. Check that the server is running and the model is available.
